allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem C:\\dev\\quadra-projeto -Force | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "---"; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 2; npx prisma generate 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 6; Write-Output "--- tsc ---"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 20; Write-Output "exit: $LASTEXITCODE")

Bash(until [ -s "/c/Users/scbv6/AppData/Local/Temp/claude/C--dev-quadra-projeto/584dc177-93c4-4d2a-9c47-5b345919dceb/tasks/bjergy04o.output" ]; do sleep 5; done; sleep 3; cat "/c/Users/scbv6/AppData/Local/Temp/claude/C--dev-quadra-projeto/584dc177-93c4-4d2a-9c47-5b345919dceb/tasks/bjergy04o.output")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=[x for x in d['slots'] if x['taken']][0]; print\(json.dumps\(s, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")

PowerShell($env:PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION = "Sim, pode resetar"; npx prisma db push --force-reset --accept-data-loss 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; Write-Output "--- seed ---"; npm run db:seed 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8)

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\)\); const f=d.slots[0],l=d.slots[d.slots.length-1]; console.log\('primeiro slot:', new Date\(f.startAt\).toLocaleString\('pt-BR',{timeZone:'America/Sao_Paulo'}\)\); console.log\('ultimo slot:', new Date\(l.startAt\).toLocaleString\('pt-BR',{timeZone:'America/Sao_Paulo'}\)\); console.log\('bookable count:', d.slots.filter\(s=>s.bookable\).length\)")

Bash(node -e 'const{PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{await p.booking.deleteMany\({where:{apartment:{cpf:'\\''11122233396'\\''}}}\);await p.apartment.update\({where:{cpf:'\\''11122233396'\\''},data:{blockedUntil:null}}\);console.log\('\\''limpo: reservas e bloqueio do Joao'\\''\);}\)\(\).finally\(\(\)=>p.$disconnect\(\)\)')
